title: Music Remastered [MMR]
description: Replacing all of Minecraft's tracks with music covers and live instrumental songs that are streamer friendly.
body:
![banner](https://i.ibb.co/0jm08hxq/Untitled-design-2.png)

**The same tracks you love but played with live instruments or edited to be streamable!**

# PREVIEW HERE:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EbYAvyJA5no" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
